# Day 6 Advanced Analytics

1. Highest one-day 95% VaR loss is -2.69% for SBI Small Cap Fund - Direct Plan - Growth.
2. SIP continuity analysis reviewed 1,362 investors with at least 6 SIP transactions.
3. 97.8% of recurring SIP investors are flagged as at-risk using average gap > 35 days.
4. Highest sector concentration HHI is 0.297 for Axis Bluechip Fund - Regular - Growth.
5. Recommendation logic ranks funds by scorecard and Sharpe within matched risk appetite.
